sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78452" key="paranabai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρανα-βαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n78452.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mount a chariot beside</tr_> one, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
